name: marshal_spec_constant
code:
proof fn phi_2_marshal_spec_constant<T: ResourceView>(s1: T::Spec, s2: T::Spec)
    requires
        true,
    ensures
        T::marshal_spec(s1) == T::marshal_spec(s2),

}
